news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes Continues Expansion of Leveraged, Single-Stock ETF Lineup with the Launch of 2X Long Single-Stock ETFs Tracking Adobe Inc. (Ticker: ADBG), Robinhood Markets Inc. (Ticker: HOOG), and Palo Alto Networks Inc. (Ticker: PANG)

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long PANW Daily ETF (PANG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (PANW) stock, less fees, and expenses PANG was launched on Mar 21, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes Continues Expansion of Leveraged, Single-Stock ETF Lineup with the Launch of 2X Long Single-Stock ETFs Tracking Adobe Inc. (Ticker: ADBG), Robinhood Markets Inc. (Ticker: HOOG), and Palo Alto Networks Inc. (Ticker: PANG)
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., March 21, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes announces the expansion of its leveraged, single-stock ETF lineup in the US with the launch of new ETFs listed on the Nas...
